title: Hub Marker
description: Hub identity metadata placed at {hub-vault}/.sync/hub-marker.json. Declares the vault as a Hub and specifies its role (core vs preset) in the Multi-Hub topology.

hubId.description: Unique hub identifier used by satellites to verify a Hub binding.

hubType.description: Role of this Hub. 'core' = single authoritative Core layer source. 'preset' = derived hub with Core inherited and custom overlay.

coreHub.description: Relative path (from this Hub's vault root) to the Core Hub. Required when hubType='preset'.

coreHubVersion.description: Required Core Hub version range for compatibility (Preset Hubs only). Supports semver-like ranges: '1.2.3' (exact), '^1.2.3' (same major), '~1.2.3' (same minor), '>=1.2.3', '<=1.2.3', '>1.2.3', '<1.2.3'. Checked by 'aimv install-hub' before install and by 'core-sync-all' before push.

description.description: Short description of the hub's purpose and bundle contents.

defaultTemplate.description: Default clone source for satellites bound to this Hub. Used by `aimv clone --hub <thisHub>` when --source-path is not given. Resolution: (a) bare name like 'BasicDomainVault' → sibling of this Hub in BasicVaults/; (b) relative path starting with '../' or '.' → relative to this Hub root; (c) absolute path → used as-is. If unset or unresolvable, clone falls back to BasicContentsVault sibling.
